TIN.description: Unique taxpayer identifier issued by FIRS; often 10–12 digits on official correspondence.

PAYE.description: Income tax deducted at source by an employer from salary or wages.

NHF.description: Statutory housing-related contribution that may qualify as an allowable deduction where the Act permits.

NHIS.description: Health insurance premiums paid under NHIS or similar schemes, where deductible under applicable rules.

CRA.description: Personal relief computed under the Finance Act rules before tax on chargeable income.

WHT.description: Tax withheld at source on qualifying payments; may be credited against final liability where applicable.
